Spring Data Elasticsearch
  1. org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.reindex

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.reindex

Packages that use org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.reindex
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc
This package contains classes that use the new Elasticsearch client library (co.elastic.clients:elasticsearch-java) to access Elasticsearch.
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core
 
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.reindex
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.reindex used by org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc
    Class
    Description
    ReindexRequest
    Request to reindex some documents from one index to another.
    ReindexResponse
    Response of reindex request.
